response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience, well above the 6+ year requirement. Recent roles at Stripe and Shopify show direct work with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), which aligns tightly with the role. Solid background in testing, DevOps, and architecture. Some concerns around lack of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin experience, but the foundation is strong enough to ramp quickly.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience at Stripe and Shopify with full-stack delivery
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and DevOps
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention; resume lists MongoDB but limited PostgreSQL/relational depth
No Kotlin experience listed (secondary stack requirement)
Several overlapping concurrent roles (Datadog 'Founder' since 2016 alongside Stripe/Shopify) raise clarification questions

key_factors.factor: Relevant primary stack and AI-agent experience
Senior tenure at top-tier companies (Stripe, Shopify)
